items.title: Chinese Yuan: Upside bias holds near 6.7600 against US Dollar – UOB
items.summary: United Overseas Bank’s Quek Ser Leang notes that USD/CNH retains a downside bias in both the 24-hour and 1–3 week horizons, with key support around 6.7600 and strong resistance at 6.7820.
